## Zscaler Undervaluation Questioned After Coforge Launches AI Security Product

IT services firms like Coforge entering AI security could commoditize adjacent workflows and slow ZS's net new ARR momentum; worth tracking whether enterprise buyers treat this as a credible substitute or a distraction.

- Coforge's entry into AI-native security is cited as a new competitive pressure point for Zscaler.
- Coverage raises the question of whether ZS is now undervalued in light of the competitive development.
- No financial metrics, contract data, or technical comparison provided in headline.
- Single outlet, medium confidence; framing is speculative.
